title: rubus alpinus
intro: Rubus alpinus, also known as the Alpine Raspberry or Mountain Raspberry, is a perennial plant species in the Rosaceae family, native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus alpinus include its ability to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit potential anti-cancer properties. Rubus alpinus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which are commonly used in herbal medicine to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
